pageContext.name: The Exorcist 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: You'll Want to Possess this New Chibi® Coin!   This second scarily tempting Chibi® Coin in our new Horror Series is for one of the most horrifying movies ever made, The Exorcist 1oz Silver Coin.  The coin shows a colored and shaped Chibi version of Regan MacNeil as she appeared towards the end of the movie, fully possessed! As a Niue legal tender coin, it features the Public Seal of Niue on the obverse along with confirmation that the coin is indeed 1oz of pure silver.  With packaging to match, this is a devilishly perfect collectible for any fan of this cult classic movie. A window in the box allows you to easily display the horror inside!  The is a limited edition, with only 2,000 coins available worldwide. Hurry if you want to possess one!
